name: Local Groups Discovery
description: Detects enumeration of local groups and their members
query:
// Detect local group enumeration
// Trigger on net localgroup, groups, or Get-LocalGroupMember
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(net\s+localgroup|Get-LocalGroup|groups\s+|id\s+|dscl.*-list.*Groups)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 2
within 120 seconds
